Enumeration Case# kIONetworkFeatureTSOIPv4

macOS 10.12+

```
kIONetworkFeatureTSOIPv4 = 0x010
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/kernel/1646638-anonymous/kionetworkfeaturetsoipv4#discussion)

Set this bit to advertise support for TCP/IPv4 segmentation offload.
